race.comment: A SUMMER FLING (7) bolted in two back to break her maiden before a 2.4L defeat before the break as an odds-on pop. The form out of that race was very strong and she'll be better for a recent trial. Chris Parnham remains in the saddle today and she profiles beautifully for a race like this. Can resume with a bang. MYSTERIOUS FORTUNE (2) comes back to 1200m today after being claimed late over further at Ascot last time out. Coming back to this trip and grade looks a good move with Harvey replacing the apprentice hoop. Can return to winning ways. MISS DEFIES ME (8) is some niggle on her recent trials but she rates highly on the debut victory. SWANSEE (9) is next best.
